privileged_info_summary: The task configures a Moodle course BIO302 Advanced Cell Biology with five activities: a Page (view completion), two Assignments (submit completion), a Quiz (pass completion at 70%), and a Forum (post completion). The task requires setting course completion when all five activities are complete, and creating a badge named 'Advanced Cell Biology Scholar' with course completion criteria and 3-year relative expiry (94,608,000 seconds). All data is synthetic, created programmatically via PHP in setup_task.sh.
